level.setting: An abandoned, decaying subterranean alchemical laboratory bathed in sickly green fog.

encounters.hazard: Leaking mercury pipes covering the floor

pickup.name: Silver Catalyst
pickup.effect: Increases the reactivity of alchemical mixtures

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct forces the locked steel door to the containment ward to unseal.

encounters.hazard: Flickering lights creating unpredictable blind spots

pickup.name: Distilled Essence
pickup.effect: Increases the potency and damage output of weapons

encounters.trigger: The leeches perish, causing the barrier to the inner sanctum to dissolve.

encounters.hazard: Toxic gas vents cycling throughout the room

pickup.name: Philosopher's Ember
pickup.effect: A burning coal that stabilizes volatile matter

encounters.trigger: The wraith disintegrates, revealing the secret path to the Alchemist's Master Chamber.

boss.name: The Failed Homunculus
boss.victory_condition: Use the Philosopher's Ember to stabilize the Homunculus's physical form before it consumes the lab.

level.objective: Purify the laboratory of the corrupted alchemical experiments.

level.setting: Abandoned asylum filled with spectral rot and oppressive darkness

pickup.name: Chilled Essence
pickup.effect: Stabilizes necrotic flesh for easier targeting

encounters.trigger: Upon defeating the stalker, the ward doors slam open to the morgue.

pickup.name: Essence of Void
pickup.effect: Dissolves incorporeal shields

encounters.trigger: Killing the corpse triggers a spectral wail that reveals the basement entrance.

encounters.hazard: Spikes of corruption protruding from walls

pickup.name: Key of Embers
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss's containment cell

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Walker causes the containment field around the boss chamber to collapse.

boss.name: The Eternal Smother
boss.victory_condition: Use the Key of Embers to ignite the containment fuel, incinerating the entity.

level.objective: Purge the asylum of the spectral rot and escape.

level.setting: A fog-shrouded, dilapidated estate where shadows stretch and move independently of light sources

encounters.hazard: Creaky floorboards that amplify sound and attract nearby spirits

pickup.name: Bottled Moonlight
pickup.effect: Casts a blinding light that stuns corporeal enemies

encounters.trigger: Defeating the wraith reveals a hidden trapdoor leading to the cellar

encounters.hazard: Leaking acidic pipes that inflict damage over time

pickup.name: Cursed Silver Key
pickup.effect: Emits a pulse that disrupts demonic energy

encounters.trigger: Defeating the corpse unlocks the heavy iron vault gate in the corner

encounters.hazard: Flickering candles that create shifting zones of darkness

pickup.name: Relic of Binding
pickup.effect: Forms a tether between the wielder and a target to lock it in place

encounters.trigger: Defeating the hound breaks the final seal on the ritual altar, awakening the boss

boss.name: Void Lord
boss.victory_condition: Weaken the Void Lord and activate the Relic of Binding to seal the rift forever

level.objective: Banish the void entity haunting the manor

pickup.name: Iron-tipped Arrows
pickup.effect: Increase damage penetration

encounters.trigger: The death of the Shadow Creeper activates the gate to the ruins

encounters.hazard: Ghostly fog that blinds the player

pickup.name: Radiant Amulet
pickup.effect: Deals holy light damage

encounters.trigger: The Guardian dissipates and activates the elevator to the altar

pickup.name: Sunfire Oil
pickup.effect: Coats weapon for burn damage

encounters.trigger: The spirit's destruction breaks the seal on the boss chamber

boss.name: The Hollow King
boss.victory_condition: Destroy the King's shadow realm tether

level.objective: Cleanse the corrupted outpost of the undead

level.setting: A crumbling, ancient archive trapped in a temporal rift

pickup.name: Ancient Parchment
pickup.effect: Grants knowledge of spectral anatomy

encounters.trigger: Reading the parchment aloud causes the hidden staircase to manifest

pickup.name: Cursed Lantern
pickup.effect: Illuminates hidden sigils on walls

encounters.trigger: Using the lantern reveals the secret door to the inner sanctum

pickup.name: Forbidden Grimoire
pickup.effect: Unlocks soul-binding spells

encounters.trigger: Opening the Grimoire breaks the protective seal of the final vault

boss.name: Librarian of Souls
boss.victory_condition: Use the Grimoire to bind the Librarian to the ethereal plane

level.objective: Retrieve the Forbidden Grimoire to gain control over the library
level.reward: The title of Arch-Necromancer and eternal custody of the archive

pickup.name: Stun Grenade
pickup.effect: Stuns biological targets for 5 seconds

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Flesh Stalker forces the security bulkhead to the hallway to retract

pickup.name: Ignited Flare
pickup.effect: Burns enemies and blinds sensory organs

encounters.trigger: Banshee death shatters the containment seal to the underground boiler room

pickup.name: Ancient Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the door to the Inner Sanctum

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the Ancient Key awakens the entity inside the Inner Sanctum

boss.name: The Malignant Archon
boss.victory_condition: Stab the Ancient Key into the Archon's core to shatter its invulnerability barrier

level.objective: Survive the nightmare and escape the facility alive
level.reward: The shard of the Archon providing eternal vitality

pickup.name: Sacred Fertilizer
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to root-based creatures

encounters.trigger: Clearing the foyer unlocks the irrigation controls for the nursery.

pickup.name: Ancient Pruning Shears
pickup.effect: Severing tool that weakens sentient plant tissue

encounters.trigger: Defeating the knight grants entry to the high-security Orchid Ossuary.

pickup.name: Sun-Crystal Core
pickup.effect: Highly concentrated light energy

encounters.trigger: The creature's demise triggers the awakening of the central Bloom Guardian.

boss.name: Bloom Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Overload the Guardian's heart with the Sun-Crystal core during its vulnerability phase.

level.objective: Purify the Glass Cathedral of its parasitic blight.

level.setting: A cursed, abandoned toy workshop full of sentient, creepy playthings.

pickup.name: Golden Clockwork Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the heavy vault door leading to the storage room.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the doll reveals the mechanism to open the path to the storage room.

pickup.name: Prism Lens
pickup.effect: Refracts light to reveal hidden doorways.

encounters.trigger: The sprite drops a gear that activates the elevator to the grand hallway.

pickup.name: Sacred Paintbrush
pickup.effect: Allows the player to rewrite the appearance of objects.

encounters.trigger: Refracting light with the lens clears the fog, revealing the boss chamber door.

boss.name: The Grand Puppeteer
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sacred Paintbrush to repaint the strings of the boss, causing them to collapse harmlessly.

level.objective: Escape the haunted toy workshop by overcoming the toys and the Puppeteer.

level.setting: A collapsing gear-driven airship spiraling toward a clockwork city

encounters.hazard: High-pressure steam jets spraying from pipe ruptures

pickup.name: Insulated Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Provides electrical resistance and functions as a specialized tool component

encounters.trigger: The death of the spider triggers the hydraulic blast doors to open into the Boiler Room

pickup.name: Heavy Lubricant Canister
pickup.effect: Reduces mechanical friction and can jam complex gear mechanisms

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the automaton causes the floor to shift and reveals the elevator to the Control Deck

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Required to access the primary flight stabilizer

encounters.trigger: Securing the key initiates the emergency lock-down sequence and awakens the Core-Mind

boss.name: The Architect's Core-Mind
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Master Override Key into the core while its defenses are down to stabilize the ship

level.objective: Stabilize the airship core before it crashes into the city below

pickup.name: brass capacitor
pickup.effect: increases conductivity of metal items

encounters.trigger: the sentry's collapse deactivates the energy barrier blocking the steam vents

pickup.name: lubricant vial
pickup.effect: overheats machinery when applied

encounters.trigger: the destroyed construct triggers a service override opening the elevator to the main engine room

pickup.name: thermal insulator
pickup.effect: provides resistance to extreme temperatures

encounters.trigger: the defeat of the golem releases the safety locks on the boss central containment pedestal

boss.name: the grand clockmaker
boss.victory_condition: use the thermal insulator to survive the overheating core and stabilize the mechanism

pickup.name: High-Viscosity Lubricant
pickup.effect: Slows down mechanical movement

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Automaton forces a steam vent to collapse, clearing a path to the Valve Chamber.

pickup.name: Brass Skeleton Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks heavy security blast doors

encounters.trigger: Capturing the squirrel exposes a hidden keyhole leading to the Main Engine Room.

pickup.name: Ornate Golden Cog
pickup.effect: Used to jam intricate clockwork mechanisms

encounters.trigger: The Rat-Bot's explosion triggers the emergency lift to the Master Engine Platform.

boss.name: Grand Clockwork Alchemist
boss.victory_condition: Jam the boss's central drive mechanism with the Golden Cog then launch a final flask.

level.objective: Deactivate the runaway Steam Generator before it causes a comical but dangerous explosion.

level.setting: A crumbling, gear-driven clockwork manufactory beneath the smog-covered streets of Victorian London.

pickup.name: Copper Wrench
pickup.effect: Allows the player to loosen high-pressure valve gears on mechanical enemies.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentry allows the player to use the Copper Wrench to disable the heavy security gate leading to the Furnace Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Floor panels glowing with intense heat

pickup.name: Arcane Capacitor
pickup.effect: Charges the stiletto with static electricity to disrupt electrical components.

encounters.trigger: Shutting down the Pressure Guardian releases the internal steam pressure, revealing the path to the Vault Antechamber.

encounters.hazard: Rotating gear floors that cut movement speed

pickup.name: Brass Key-Card
pickup.effect: Access token for the central command console of the Grand Overseer.

encounters.trigger: Killing the Assassin forces it to drop the Brass Key-Card, granting the player access to the final boss containment room.

boss.name: The Grand Clockwork Overseer
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Brass Key-Card into the control panel to drop the boss shield and defeat the entity.

level.objective: Disable the gear-works and retrieve the stolen Chrono-Engine.
level.reward: The Gilded Chrono-Engine (allows time-slowing ability in future missions).

level.setting: The Clockwork Spire, a decaying tower fueled by volatile, crackling lightning

pickup.name: Copper Conductive Oil
pickup.effect: Increases attack reach by coating the rod

encounters.trigger: Defeating the scrapper causes a steam pipe to explode, clearing the path to the Turbine Hall

pickup.name: Arc-Stabilizer Coil
pickup.effect: Reduces electrical discharge damage by 50 percent

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentinel causes a power surge that triggers the emergency lift to the Spire Summit

pickup.name: Overclocking Core
pickup.effect: Grants a one-time massive energy discharge burst

encounters.trigger: Overloading the automaton's core shatters the rusted seal on the Boss Chamber door

boss.name: The Brass Monarch
boss.victory_condition: Short-circuit the Monarch's main control valve using the Overclocking Core

level.objective: Reach the summit of the Clockwork Spire and deactivate the storm-generating core
level.reward: Sovereign Clockwork Crown which provides infinite lightning energy

level.setting: A desolate, smog-choked clockwork city built atop the ruins of an ancient civilization

pickup.name: Temporal Oil
pickup.effect: Reduces enemy attack speed for 5 seconds

encounters.trigger: Defeating the automaton grants access to the Engine Room gate

pickup.name: Brass-Refraction Lens
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden energy signatures

encounters.trigger: Using the lens reveals the secret passage to the Core Chamber

pickup.name: Capacitor Core
pickup.effect: Allows discharge of high-voltage electric pulses

encounters.trigger: Destroying the crawler forces the main reactor to vent, exposing the Boss Lair

boss.name: Chronos-Sentinel
boss.victory_condition: Discharge the Capacitor Core to stun the boss and overload its steam heart

level.objective: Restart the city's main temporal engine to clear the toxic smog
level.reward: The Chronos-Key, allowing travel to other floating clockwork islands

level.setting: Eerie clockwork foundry obscured by thick, rusted smog

pickup.name: Conductive Oil
pickup.effect: Applies an electrical charge to mechanical parts

encounters.trigger: Destroying the automaton triggers the release of the primary steam pressure valve to clear the hallway.

encounters.hazard: Sharp moving cogs that shred armor

pickup.name: Magnetic Core
pickup.effect: Powerful magnet that disrupts mechanical movement

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Gear-Spider forces a hidden blast door open leading to the main laboratory.

pickup.name: Overload Capacitor
pickup.effect: Causes instant power failure in mechanical enemies

encounters.trigger: Eliminating the assassin initiates the final sequence to unlock the boss chamber.

boss.name: The Grand Artificer
boss.victory_condition: Successfully destabilize the Artificer's mechanical heart with the Magnetic Core

level.objective: Disable the master engine before it drains the city's energy
level.reward: Mastery over clockwork metal and ancient schematic blueprints

level.setting: An abandoned brass-clockwork observatory floating in a calm, misty sky

pickup.name: Brass Oil
pickup.effect: Lubricates gears for smooth mechanical movement

encounters.trigger: Defeating the rat repairs the mechanism to open the library doors

pickup.name: Reflective Shield
pickup.effect: Deflects focused steam projectiles

encounters.trigger: Clearing the spider clears the path to the main lift

pickup.name: Master Gear
pickup.effect: Powers the final observatory rotation

encounters.trigger: Stopping the guard activates the final elevator to the observation dome

boss.name: Clockwork Architect
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Master Gear into the Architect's chassis to shut down the machine

level.objective: Restore the Celestial Orrery to its peaceful rotation
level.reward: The Golden Gear of Time and eternal tranquility for the observatory
